ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment in the institution */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "architecture" INTEGER /* Interest level in architecture (0-5) */,
  "automotive" INTEGER /* Interest level in automotive (0-5) */,
  "business" INTEGER /* Interest level in business (0-5) */,
  "construction" INTEGER /* Interest level in construction (0-5) */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Interest level in health (0-5) */,
  "environment" INTEGER /* Interest level in environment (0-5) */,
  "manufacturing" INTEGER /* Interest level in manufacturing (0-5) */,
  "technology" INTEGER /* Interest level in technology (0-5) */,
  "interest_date" TEXT /* Date when the interest was noted */,
  "interest_source" TEXT /* Source of the interest information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interests_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_interests" (
  "career_interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career interest record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "career_interest" TEXT /* Career interest (e.g., software developer, civil engineer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the career interest */,
  "interest_level" INTEGER /* Level of interest (0-5) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the career interest information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("career_interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_interests_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liked_courses" (
  "liked_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liked course record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course was taken */,
  "course_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the student about the course */,
  "grade_received" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("liked_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_liked_courses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disliked_courses" (
  "disliked_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disliked course record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course was taken */,
  "course_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the student about the course */,
  "grade_received" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disliked_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disliked_courses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the club */,
  "club_category" TEXT /* Category of the club */,
  "meeting_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of club meetings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "join_clubs" (
  "join_club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each join club record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the student joined the club */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student in the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("join_club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_join_clubs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_join_clubs_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "not_clubs" (
  "not_club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each not join club record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for not joining the club */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student if they had joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("not_club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_not_clubs_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_not_clubs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_category" TEXT /* Category of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liked_projects" (
  "liked_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liked project record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the student liked the project */,
  "project_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the student about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("liked_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_liked_projects_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_liked_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disliked_projects" (
  "disliked_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disliked project record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "dislike_date" TEXT /* Date the student disliked the project */,
  "project_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the student about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disliked_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disliked_projects_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disliked_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drawing_skills" (
  "drawing_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drawing skill record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "drawing_skill_level" INTEGER /* Drawing skill level (0-5) */,
  "drawing_type" TEXT /* Type of drawing (e.g., technical, artistic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drawing skill */,
  "skill_certification" TEXT /* Certifications in drawing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drawing_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawing_skills_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
